raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Jums ne buhs zitteem
fweſcheem Deeweem paſtaſdſih-
tees/ no to Laufsnu Deeweem/
kas apfahrt jums irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. Jo TAS STIPRAJS
DEEWS/ TAS DUSMO-
TAJS/ TAS KUNGS
TAW̄S DEEWS irr tawa
Widdū/ ka ta KUNGA tawa
Deewa Bahrsiba prett tew ne
apſkaistahs/ un isdelde tew no
Semmes Wirſus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "16. Jums ne buhs to KUN-
GU juhſu Deewu fahrdinaht/ it-
tin ka juhs wiꞥſu fahrdinajat
Maffâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "17. Turredami turrat ta
KUNGA juhſu Deewa Bauf-
lus/ lihſ ar wiꞥſa Leezibahn/
un ar wiꞥſa Lifkumeem/ fo
wiꞥſch tew pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "18. Un darri/ kas teefa un
labbs irr preeſch ta KUNGA
Azzim/ ka tew labbi klahjahs/ un
tu ee-eij eemantoht to labbu
Semmi/ fo tas KUNGS ta-
weem Tehweem swehrejs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "19. IſdsihDams wiſus ta-
wus Eenaidneekus tawa Preek-
fchâ/ ittin ka tas KUNGS irr
runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "20. Kad taws Dehls tew turp-
mae jautahs/ un fazzih̄s: furrag
irr tahs Leezibas/ un tee Lifku-
mi/ un Teefas/ fo tas KUNGS
muhſu Deetws juuns paweh-
lejs irr?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. Tad buhs tew tawa
Dehlam atbildcht/ mehs bija
Warauſ Kalpi Egiptes-Semmi
bet tas KUNGS irr muhs za-
weenu ſtipru Rohku no Egipte
Semmes iſweddis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "22. Un tas KUNGS de-
Sihmes/ un leeſus un breefu-
gns Brihnumns Egiptes-Se-
mê pee Warauſ/ un pee wi-
wiꞥſa Namuna preeſch mu-
fahm Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "23. Un wiꞥſch iſwedde mu-
no turrenes/ tadeht ka wi-
muhs eewestu/ dohdams mun-
to Semmi/ fo wiꞥſch muhſee
Tehweem bij swehrejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "24. Un tas KUNGS pawe-
leja mums wiſus ſchohs Lif-
mus darricht/ ka mums buhs
KUNGU muhſu Deetwu bihtee
mums par labbu muhſcham/
mehs dſihwi taptun paturre-
itt ka tas ſchodeen irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "25. Un tas buhs mu-
Taifniba/ ka mehs fargafimi-
un darrifim wiſus ſchohs Ba-
lus ta KUNGA muhſu Dee-
Preekſcha/ ka wiꞥſch mums p-
wehlejs irr.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
